title: CVE-2026-42005: DNS Unlimited Memory Allocation
summary: [P1] CVE-2026-42005 allows an attacker to send a web request that causes unlimited memory allocation in DNS servers, with no patch available. This vulnerability can lead to denial-of-service attacks. Why now: Reported attribution (unverified): none (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: This vulnerability affects the network layer and can cause a denial-of-service attack, which is a type of dos problem.

enrichment.lede: CISA Adds Two Known Exploited Vulnerabilities to Catalog.

title: CVE-2026-40208: DoH3 Query Delay
summary: [P1] CVE-2026-40208 allows an attacker to delay the processing of DoH3 queries by sending crafted queries, with no patch available. This vulnerability can lead to denial-of-service attacks. Why now: Reported attribution (unverified): none (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: This vulnerability affects the network layer and can cause a denial-of-service attack, which is a type of dos problem.

title: CVE-2026-33612: Crafted Zone ZoneToCache Function
summary: [P1] CVE-2026-33612 allows a malicious authoritative server to send a crafted zone via the ZoneToCache function, with no patch available. This vulnerability can lead to unauthorized data modification. Why now: Reported attribution (unverified): none (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: This vulnerability affects the network layer and can cause unauthorized data modification, which is a type of data_tampering problem.
